reviews.review_title: 🏍️ Master the Mud and the Machine!
reviews.review_description:
The studio behind several great manual bike games (like Mountain Bike and Hand Bike) is back with Motocross Offroad, this time bringing an engine-powered thrill ride to VR. Motorbikes are notoriously tricky to handle, but the team pulls it off with solid driving sensations and plenty of fun moments that make you want to keep improving.

Each level tests your control, precision, and reflexes, and as you progress, you can unlock new bikes with improved features. It’s a satisfying balance of challenge and entertainment — the kind of game that rewards persistence while staying casual enough to jump in and enjoy. I might have been lucky to play the game after it did some updates and improved the overall game.

A great all-rounder for VR motorbike fans — fun, dynamic, and perfect for when you just want to hit the dirt and have a good time!

reviews.review_description: I loved the landscaping on the levels.I'm like in a real race 👏

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description:
I love riding bikes and motorcycles in VR. Motocross Offroad turned out to be an OK motocross racing game. On the good side, it has some beautiful levels, a stunt level, a nice selection of levels, short gameplay sessions (considering hand fatigue and it's in VR), which I like, challenging but fair competition against AI, and the ability to unlock new teams/bikes and new levels upon winning, and to reset the position of the bike on failure.

On the downside, I didn't feel the weight of the bike, which usually works well when the controller's vibration, sound effects, handling accuracy, and physics are well put together. In this case, it felt off to some degree. I also found the sound effects to be a bit muddy.

Overall, I think it's a good motocross VR racing game, but I didn't feel out of my seat.
Definitely worth it if you're looking for an immersive and challenging realistic motocross offroad racing experience in VR for Quest 2.

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved the game and it's an experience that should definitely be tried, a must-have adventure!

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: "Motocross Offroad is truly a game that must be experienced in VR. The controls and the sensation are incredibly well-executed. There are numerous maps and different types of motorcycles available. Such a fast-paced motocross experience offers something truly unique. I wholeheartedly recommend it to anyone considering it. And yes, I'm craving multiplayer too! :D"

developer_response.body: Thank you, have a good game!

reviews.review_description: that is a fancy cross motorbike experience. I really thought I was airborne while jumping over the obstacles.
